channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Intermittent metformin is as effective as continuous metformin for prediabetes in postpartum women with prior gestational diabetes
item.description: In women with prediabetes after gestational diabetes, intermittent metformin combined with lifestyle changes was non-inferior to continuous use.

item.title: Cerebral venous flow's role in idiopathic intracranial hypertension revealed
item.description: When the cause of intracranial hypertension is unknown, new research highlights the role of cerebral venous flow in the condition.

item.title: Immigration enforcement seen as a primary care issue by doctors
item.description: Clinicians report that fear of immigration enforcement worsens patient mental health, delays care, and increases burnout.

item.title: Home ECG alerts for atrial fibrillation often go unheeded
item.description: Older adults with hypertension rarely sought medical evaluation after receiving atrial fibrillation alerts from home blood pressure monitors.
